title: Crypto-D3c -- Governance reconciliation memo for the auto-committed Crypto-D3b freeze

provenance.head_note: background automation advances HEAD continuously; the ratified D3b commit 5b3d94c is confirmed an ancestor of HEAD
provenance.ratified_commit_message: Freeze crypto spot daily data snapshot

1_issue.summary: Crypto-D3b (the factory-internal crypto data freeze) was committed by background automation as 5b3d94c BEFORE explicit human approval.
1_issue.why_it_matters: The validation factory is a strictly-gated, sequential process: every numbered step requires separate explicit approval before any git staging/commit. An autonomous commit of a factory/crypto artifact bypasses that gate, even when the artifact content is correct.

4_sha256_result.note: on-disk hashes recomputed during the D3b audit; identical to both provenance.json and report.json

5_source_integrity.proof: current size/mtime exactly match the values provenance.json recorded at freeze time; the freeze was read-only on the source

6_safety_result.scan_note: every broker/fapi/order/trade keyword hit in the D3b tree is a negation or documentation string (e.g. 'broker': false, no_exchange_api_execution, 'perp would be fapi'); no active execution, credentials, or live/paper commands present

7_governance_decision.rationale: The audited content is fully clean (QA CLEAN, SHA256 matched, 2026 sealed, source unmodified, no unsafe artifact). Reverting would discard verified-correct work and add churn; the defect was procedural, not substantive. The freeze is therefore accepted retroactively.
7_governance_decision.scope_limit: Ratification covers ONLY the D3b data freeze (the immutable, hash-pinned, 2026-sealed BTC/ETH/SOL spot daily USDT snapshot). It does NOT authorize Crypto-D4, any strategy, any fetch, or any execution.

8_required_process_correction.no_auto_commit: Background automation MUST NOT auto-commit trading/factory/crypto artifacts without explicit user approval.
8_required_process_correction.explicit_pathspec: Future commits must use explicit pathspec (no 'git add .' / no broad directory adds).
8_required_process_correction.stop_at_untracked: Future auto-generated artifacts must stop at UNTRACKED status until a human approves staging/commit.
8_required_process_correction.applies_to: all factory steps (futures branches and crypto lane), including any future Crypto-D4+ artifacts
8_required_process_correction.status: RECOMMENDED_CORRECTION -- this memo records the requirement; enforcing it (pausing/guarding the automation) is a separate action not performed by this memo

9_next_allowed_step.crypto_d4_spec: Crypto-D4 (choose/re-freeze ONE crypto strategy spec, pre-registered, no parameter freedom) MAY proceed later -- but ONLY after this governance memo (Crypto-D3c) is committed, and only under separate explicit authorization.

final_line: Crypto-D3c ratifies the auto-committed Crypto-D3b freeze (5b3d94c) IN PLACE because its contents passed audit (QA CLEAN, SHA256 matched, 2026 sealed, source unmodified, no unsafe artifact); the process violation (automation auto-committed before approval) is recorded and must not repeat -- future auto-generated factory/crypto artifacts must stop at untracked until explicitly approved. No crypto strategy is specified, validated, paper-ready, live-ready, or authorized; Crypto-D4 is not started; perps remain blocked; S30 and the futures branches are untouched.
trading_recommendation: NONE. Governance memo only. The Crypto-D3b data freeze is ratified (DATA_READY_FOR_CRYPTO_D4_SPEC) but no crypto strategy is validated, paper-ready, or live-ready; Crypto-D4 is not authorized; perps blocked; crypto stays a separate research lane; S30 stays PARKED after IS_FAIL and the futures branches are untouched.
